final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-anime
Asset type: dynamic sports illustration, square crop
Primary request: basketball player performing a powerful slam dunk mid-air on a basketball court, full of tension and passion
Scene/backdrop: indoor basketball court, cheering crowd in the background with camera flashlights bursting
Subject: athletic basketball player soaring high above the rim, muscles tensed, ball gripped in one hand driving downward, sweat droplets flying off the body in all directions
Style/medium: hot-blooded shonen anime illustration, bold ink outlines, high-contrast cel shading, dramatic action lines radiating from the focal point
Composition/framing: low-angle dynamic shot looking up at the player, exaggerated perspective to emphasize height and power
Lighting/mood: intense stadium lighting from below and sides, crowd flashlights creating bursts of white light, electrifying and passionate atmosphere
Color palette: vivid orange basketball, deep court brown, bright white flash bursts, saturated crowd colors in background
Materials/textures: anime-style sweat beads with motion trails, speed lines and motion blur on limbs and ball, bold action streaks
Constraints: keep the slam dunk as the absolute focal point; crowd must be visible but blurred/stylized in background
Avoid: realistic photo rendering, static pose, flat lighting, watermark
